art_highlights: Art Basel & UBS Global Art Market Report 2026: Market remains stable with 4% annual growth ($59.6B); high-end segment shows resilience.
Dealer sector 'structural reset' continuing; strategic focus on local collector engagement and experiential sales.
Art Fairs regaining prominence for 2026; Art Basel Hong Kong (Mar 27-29) is a key upcoming litmus test for the sector.
Younger collectors continue to drive social discovery, with multi-medium collecting remaining a strong trend for Q2 2026.
U.S. market holds 44% share ($26B); stable outlook for early 2026 market participants.

market_summary.market_sentiment: Cautious optimism; focus on high-end segment and local dealer resilience.
market_summary.key_drivers: Stable 4% annual growth, shift towards experiential luxury, and high-end market resilience.
market_summary.trend: Market stabilizing post-2025 recovery; focus on long-term sustainability over aggressive growth.
